title: If You Use Agent Zero, This Video is for You (EPIC FAIL)
summary: Jordan Urbs documents a failed attempt to build an AI ad campaign generator using Agent Zero, encountering persistent LiteLLM errors that made the framework unusable. He concludes that Agent Zero shows promise but advises testing thoroughly before committing production workflows, noting Claude Code or OpenClaw would have completed the task.
